profileInformation.description: This portfolio has verified business credentials and maintains active social media accounts with substantial follower engagement across multiple platforms.

notes: Your name, email address, profile picture and actions that you take on behalf of {businessName} will be visible to other people managing this business.
Anything that you do on behalf of this business will not be shared to your personal profile.
To improve security, people with full control of your business portfolio may know whether you have enabled 2-factor authentication.
